message:
chore(deps): refresh fuzz/Cargo.lock with new transitive crates

Lockfile-only update for the fuzz workspace. The recent
substantive landings on `main` (expr escape sequences, HLL
overflow fix, join_series corpus, and the prior live-oracle
work for searchsorted/argmin/argmax/autocorr) pulled in a few
new transitive dependencies that the fuzz workspace also needs
to resolve so its `cargo fuzz build` stays green.

New transitive entries that show up in fuzz/Cargo.lock:

- `rusqlite` for the conformance harness/oracle pathway that
  speaks to the persistent oracle store.
- `ucd` and `unicode-normalization` pulled in by the expanded
  string handling in fp-expr / unicode-casefold consumers.
- `sha2` pulled in via the typed value crate's stable hashing
  helper.

No new direct dependencies and no version bumps for crates that
were already in the lockfile — this is purely the resolver
catching up to the new transitive graph from the workspace
root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -551,6 +551,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fp-runtime",
  "fp-types",
  "raptorq",
+ "rusqlite",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "serde_yaml",
@@ -585,7 +586,9 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror",
+ "ucd",
  "unicode-casefold",
+ "unicode-normalization",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -657,6 +660,7 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
+ "sha2",
  "thiserror",
 ]
